**Summary :** Amid national chaos and fear for his life, tyrannical King Gwang Hae orders his trusted councilor Heo Kyun to find a royal body double. He hires Ha Seon, a peasant mimic who bears a perfect resemblance to the King. When King Gwanghae collapses from a mysterious poison, Ha Seon reluctantly becomes a King. He must follow his conscience to save his country from collapse, avoid assassination, and pull off the biggest masqueradein history.

title: Hime-chan's Ribbon (LD XviD) - Ribbon Collection Special [Valid] (D6C417F8).mkv
description:
Original Translation: Tomodachi Anime
Song Translation: Sakaki
Editing, Timing, Typesetting: validusername16
Raw: Saiei (XviD LD-Rip)
Quality Control, Editing Help: Jecka
Special Thanks: metalotaku

This is a 12 minute bonus feature included at the end of the final Laserdisc volume, featuring Himeko's character song, some footage from the final day of recording, and short interviews with Hime-chan's voice actor Ohtani Ikue and Sound Director Wakabayashi Kazuhiro. Tomodachi initially released this special subtitled on tape volume 16 of the show, but all online digitizations did not include it. This release is based on a personal recording of Tomodachi's tape, and has been completely re-edited, re-timed, and re-typeset, with a brand new song translation, as Tomodachi only translated around half of the song, and their song translation was littered with errors. The raw is unfortunately not great, but the DVD version seemed to be missing the interview segments, so this LD rip was the only option. Hopefully one day honobono will finish the series so there can be a consistent release for the entire show.

description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/6vxmvd9a/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |



---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

***

**Elf-san wa Yaserarenai | エルフさんは痩せられない. | Plus-Sized Elf | Эльф не может похудеть [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** комедия, повседневность
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:22:00
**Количество серий:** 06 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 06.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Elias](https://myanimelist.net/anime/producer/2928/Elias)
**Снято по манге:** [Эльф не может похудеть](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6147)
**Автор оригинала:** [Синекдоха](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=929618)
**Режиссер:** [Токоро Тосикацу](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=26514)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11985), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=31557), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18412), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/57845)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (дублированный) | [Deep](https://vk.com/ruanime)
**Субтитры:** Русские 

**Описание:**
Молодой диетолог и массажист Томоацу Наоэ принимает клиентку из альтернативного мира – красивую эльфийку «плюс-сайз» Элфуду, решившую скинуть вес. Иначе она не сможет вернуться домой через волшебный портал. Перед Элфудой стоит почти непреодолимое препятствие – картошка фри, которую она считает пищей богов. Терпеливый Наоэ объясняет ей принципы похудения, но из-за любимого фастфуда его подопечная ходит по кругу. А тут ещё подтягиваются и другие сказочные существа...
Весёлое фэнтези-аниме о волшебстве и диетах на основе одноимённой манги.

title: Ascendance of a Bookworm (Español) + Extras | Honzuki no Gekokujou 本好きの下剋上
description:
Los 33 libros de La Ascensión de la Ratona de Biblioteca (Honzuki no Gekokujou, 本好きの下剋上) están completos, por ahora el último libro fue hecho por el grupo [Biblioteca de Mestionora](https://t.me/SeguidoresDeRozemyne) (que iniciaron de la parte 4 en adelante), y que considero mejor grupo que trabajó con las traducciones a pesar de que Ralevon inició primero. De cualquier forma, si desean descargar la versión de la BdM, o sea, mis compilaciones de ese grupo en esta [carpeta de OneDrive](https://1drv.ms/f/s!AlxN5QmNRU8SkwJHXDznueHHkAGR?e=bttKEk).

Los extras:

title: [DemiHuman] KonoSuba: An Explosion on This Wonderful World! (BD 1080p HEVC Opus 2.0) [Dual-Audio, Multi-Audio, Multi-Sub] | Kono Subarashii Sekai ni Bakuen wo! (Japanese, English, German Dubs)
description:
![](https://iili.io/dlxswBf.png)

---

From Demi:

This is [smol's](https://nyaa.si/view/1735308) wonderful BD release with a slew of improvements and changes.

What's new:
- English audio from the USBD (old source: Crunchyroll's AAC)
- German audio from the DEBD (new)
- Chihiro's latest subs from their BD batch (old source: WEB releases)
- German full and signs & songs subs from CR (new)
- English & German PGS subs from the USBD & DEBD (new)

What's changed:
- some missing fonts were added with the help of Fontcollector
- the "cover.png" attachment was removed in every episode
- all file titles were trimmed to just episode numbers + names
- a broken file title was edited in episode 6
- the "default" tagging of the audio/subtitle tracks was improved for automatic language preferences

[Download patch scripts for any file in smol's release to be converted to the respective file in this release here.](https://mega.nz/folder/xTtVXQhb#0XJNtoA5crnkKhyNM9GfmQ)

---

![](https://iili.io/dlxsOrl.png)

---

**Synopsis**
This feisty young wizard will stop at nothing to master the spell that saved her life: Explosion! Megumin, the “Greatest Genius of the Crimson Magic Clan,” has chosen to devote her studies to the powerful offensive magic used by her mysterious savior. Then one day, her little sister finds a black kitten in the woods. But this cat isn’t just a new furry friend—she’s the key to awakening a Dark God!

**Video**
x265 / 10 bit / 1080p / JPBD [(smol@Nyaa)](https://nyaa.si/view/1735308)

**Audio**
#1 Japanese / Opus / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 192 kbps / JPBD [(smol@Nyaa)](https://nyaa.si/view/1735308)
#2 English / Opus / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 192 kbps / USBD [(kekku@U2)](https://u2.dmhy.org/details.php?id=57060)
#3 German / Opus / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 192 kbps / DEBD [(SHiROKO@U2)](https://u2.dmhy.org/details.php?id=57171)

**Subtitles**
#1 English / Full / ASS / Chihiro¹
#2 English / Forced / ASS / Chihiro¹
#3 English / Full / ASS / smol²
#4 English / Forced / ASS / smol²
#5 German / Full / ASS / CR
#6 German / Forced / ASS / CR
#7 English / Full / PGS / USBD
#8 English / Forced / PGS / USBD
#9 German / Full / PGS / DEBD

**Chapters**
Named / smol

**Extras**
2x Creditless Openings (feat. Chihiro, USBD, DECR subs)
2x Creditless Endings (feat. Chihiro, USBD, DECR subs)

¹ sourced from their [BD batch](https://nyaa.si/view/1777230) rather than their weekly WEB releases
² restyled CR with Chihiro's typesetting and song lyrics

---

![](https://iili.io/dlxs8k7.png)

---

**Credits**
Encoding / smol
Translation / Crunchyroll / Lenmaer (Checking) / Soichiro (Songs)
Typesetting / itsP
Editing / charon
Timing / Pookie
Quality Control / akuma
Song Styling & Effects / Kristen
Various sub work / smol

**Количество серий:** 06 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 05.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Seven Arcs](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=3530)
**Снято по ранобэ:** [Hazure Waku no Joutai Ijou Skill de Saikyou ni Natta Ore ga Subete o Juurin Suru made](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6168)
**Автор оригинала:** [Синодзаки Каору](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=819182)

**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11992), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=31709), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18438), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/57892)

**Перевод  #1:** Любительский (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Любительский (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [TVShows](https://flex-kino.com)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Тока — обычный незаметный парень, которого все принимают за пустое место. Однажды его вместе с одноклассниками переносит в другой мир, но и там ничего не меняется! Все его товарищи получают сильные навыки, только Тока оказывается ни к чему не годным, и богиня Вишис ссылает его в древние развалины. Но там оказывается, что навыки Токи не такие уж никчёмные. Теперь он клянётся отомстить богине и раскрывает свой истинный характер.

title: [SubsPlus+] Dungeon People - S01E05 (AMZN WEB 1080p AVC EAC3) | Dungeon no Naka no Hito
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/sybdp378/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Chihiro**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/6v8qDRF/City-Hunter-Angels-dust-theatrical-poster.png "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# CITY HUNTER : ANGEL DUST
 
___

Ryo Saeba, un détective privé cynique mais efficace, est engagé par Angie, une belle productrice, pour retrouver son chat. Attiré par la récompense et le charme d'Angie, Ryo se lance dans l'enquête avec sa partenaire, Kaori.

Parallèlement, une agente de police, Saeko Nogami, enquête sur une mystérieuse technologie, Angel Dust, capable de transformer les soldats en surhommes. Cette substance a déjà causé la mort du précédent partenaire de Ryo.

Les tentatives d'assassinat contre Angie révèlent un lien entre l'affaire du chat et la dangereuse technologie d'Angel Dust. Ryo se retrouve confronté à un ennemi inattendu : Shin Kaibara, son propre père adoptif.
.

Ce long-métrage est un projet commémoratif produit à l’occasion 35e anniversaire de la première série animée City Hunter, diffusée à partir d’avril 1987 au Japon et plus connue en France sous le nom de Nicky Larson.

Ryo Saeba, un détective privé cynique mais efficace, est engagé par Angie, une belle productrice, pour retrouver son chat. Attiré par la récompense et le charme d'Angie, Ryo se lance dans l'enquête avec sa partenaire, Kaori.

Parallèlement, une agente de police, Saeko Nogami, enquête sur une mystérieuse technologie, Angel Dust, capable de transformer les soldats en surhommes. Cette substance a déjà causé la mort du précédent partenaire de Ryo.

Les tentatives d'assassinat contre Angie révèlent un lien entre l'affaire du chat et la dangereuse technologie d'Angel Dust. Ryo se retrouve confronté à un ennemi inattendu : Shin Kaibara, son propre père adoptif.
.

Ce long-métrage est un projet commémoratif produit à l’occasion 35e anniversaire de la première série animée City Hunter, diffusée à partir d’avril 1987 au Japon et plus connue en France sous le nom de Nicky Larson.

description:

*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/bd978kqd/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Disney+ (AVC) via Anonymous    |
| Audio     | Amazon Prime (EAC3) via Tsundere-Raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api
